summary: Iteration 6 — Coupon system end-to-end testing (backend + frontend). 22/22 new coupon backend tests PASS plus 7/7 razorpay regression tests PASS. Frontend Admin Coupons CRUD and PayModal coupon flow + chip-text change all verified end-to-end.

minor.issue: Razorpay test API occasionally returns 'Authentication failed' under burst load (rate limiting) — affected 2 tests on first run, both passed on retry within 5 seconds. Not a code defect.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py /enrollments/verify line 656 only increments used_count when enrollment.status != 'paid' — correct guard for idempotency. Good.

server.py /admin/coupons PATCH at line 1007 uses exclude_unset+filters out None values, which is correct for partial updates but means you cannot set active=False via PATCH if the dict-cleaning treats False as None. Reviewed line 1007: `v is not None` is the guard so False is preserved correctly — tested explicitly and PATCH active=False works.
server.py is now 1113 lines (well above the 700 threshold) — strongly recommend splitting routers (auth/enrollments/admin/coupons/uploads) into modules. This was already flagged in iter5.

PayModal coupon error toast uses the same 'Invalid coupon code' message the backend returns — clean. Consider also surfacing 'This coupon has expired' / 'usage limit' messages distinctly (currently they are also routed through toast.error, verified manually OK).
AdminPanel.jsx CouponForm uses native <input type='date'> for cpf-expires — acceptable for admin-only screen, but inconsistent with the rest of the app's design tokens. Low priority.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_coupons_iter6.py (new — 22 tests covering coupon CRUD + validate + checkout/verify)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin CRUD + PayModal coupon flow + chip text + invalid-coupon toast)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@vishnuraghav.in / Admin@12345. Student: registered ad-hoc each run as TEST_cpn_<hex>@example.com or TEST_pm_<hex>@example.com / Student@12345.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient coupons with code prefix 'TST<hex>' and always self-cleanup via DELETE in a try/finally. Pre-existing seeded coupons (LAUNCH20, FIXED50, EXPIRED) are read-only / unaffected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coupon system is fully implemented and verified. Razorpay test API is occasionally rate-limited (saw 1-2 'Authentication failed' responses across ~25 burst requests) — when running coupon tests + razorpay tests together, expect possibly 1 flaky failure that retries cleanly. Use test_coupons_iter6.py as the regression suite for the coupon feature. The Edit→toggle-active→reload path in AdminPanel was confirmed to persist; the page reload roundtrip works because state is fetched from /api/admin/coupons on tab activation.
